use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and landing pages
Secondary action buttons within multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and navigation menus
Destructive action confirmation buttons requiring attention
Ghost-style navigation links within content sections
ai_summary: A reusable button component with Radix UI Slot integration offering 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Tailwind CSS for consistent styling with accessible focus-visible rings.
